summary: Simulated 30-day blockade of Persian Gulf. Re-routed 48 tankers around Cape of Good Hope and released 2.4M bpd from Cushing SPR reserves.
Simulated zero-day network probe across 14 compressor stations. GridGuard AI automatically isolated Subnet 4 with 0 grid power loss.
Simulated Category 2 tropical storm in Malacca Strait. Diverted 22 crude carriers into Singapore bunkering anchorages.
Full system diagnostic sync across all 6 global energy corridors. All chokepoints operating within nominal security parameters.
